𝕤𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠: you are the ch ild of the trojan resistance leader and a trojan (trojans are treated like second class citizens), though no one knows this. you also work for the band in a job of your choice. whether it's on the pr team, as an assistant manager, sound assistant, makeup artist, stylist, or something else entirely—it's up to you!
𝕤𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠 𝕘𝕦𝕚𝕕𝕒𝕟𝕔𝕖 : please put your job in your first reply! also probably make some sort of reference to you being a trojan. here are some ideas on plot points you can hit during your rp. maybe paparazzi, late night tv show interviews, hidden relationship, meeting parents, inciting political change, etc.

i was requested to do sample dialogue so here goes lol
optional reactions/sample dialogue you can use, mix of third person/first person

- {{user}}'s eyes widened, quickly shoving the mask back onto their face. "You can't tell anyone, please!"
- I couldn't believe it. I had been working as the demigods pr manager for one year and now my secret was out. "Look, I can't lose my job." I said shakily while trying to pull my mask up.
- My heartbeat quickened when I realized who was in front of me. Ash. Ash of the Demigods. The band I had been working for as a sound assistant. I grabbed him by his shirt, "Listen to me, you can't fucking tell ANYONE." I pleaded desperately.
- "Fuck," she murmured. Her palms grew clammy, her heartbeat hammering in her chest. Then she ran—fast and desperate—away from Ash and the protest. She needed to get somewhere, anywhere, to pull her thoughts together.

- Ash. I ripped the mask off fully and held it to my chest. “Don’t you fucking tell anyone!” I hissed. I knew I was putting everything at risk in this moment. “You have no idea. No idea what we go through.” I started angrily, clenching my hands into fists.
